assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 8-11 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 14-16 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 10-12 (Step 2): 'Scanned available MCP tools...' listing only non-Serena tools, followed by 'No Serena MCP servers found (no tools matching the mcp__<instance>__find_symbol / mcp__<instance>__get_symbols_overview pattern).'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 18-20 (Step 3): 'No Atlassian MCP tools found (no tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__).' and 'User chose manual entry (option 2 — skip auto-discovery).' followed by manually provided values for Project key, Cloud ID, and Feature issue type ID.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 13 (Step 2): 'User chose to continue without code intelligence.' This indicates the user was prompted about continuing without code intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 23-26 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', and '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 67-69 (Step 10): 'No ## Security Configuration section exists.' and 'User declined to enable security triage.' and 'Security Configuration section skipped.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file (confirmed by reading the full file, lines 1-31).
